description:
It helps to promote a healthy head full of hair by stimulating and spreading the natural oils from the scalp throughout the full hair length, from root to tip.

You can use this detangling brush for curly or straight hair, to detangle thick or thin hair and massage your scalp without pulling your hair.

LARGE CURVED HEAD: The two hair brush detanglers feature large heads with a meniscus radian design, the combination of a convex curve and a concave curve give both brushes the maximum number of scalp contact points to massage and promote natural oil stimulation.

VENTED FOR FASTER DRYING: We designed the large head of our hair brushes with vents to create a more efficient airflow for faster drying while styling your hair with a blow dryer.
EASY
